recommendations.rec: TOP PRIORITY (6 consecutive days, dominant prod-main fail class — 4 prod-main hard-fails today). The copilot-sdk-driver path denies routine read-only/branch-setup commands the workflows legitimately need (`git checkout -b`, `git status`, `git show`, `awk`/`sed` over source, `read` of .changeset/.md/.go/_test.go) then aborts at 5 denials with NO retry, wasting up to 6.18M tokens (Daily Agent of the Day). Two-part fix: (1) broaden the default allow-tool list for the sdk-driver to include git read/branch ops + read of repo source/markdown, OR relax the 5-denial guard for read-only operations; (2) since the claude engine TOLERATES the same denials, align the copilot-sdk-driver denial-handling to soft-skip-and-continue instead of hard-abort. Affects Daily Agent of the Day, Breaking Change Checker, Daily Formal Spec Verifier, Daily Safe Output Integrator.

NEW prod-main failure: Daily Issues Report Generator entrypoint aborted because 'node' is not reachable inside the AWF chroot (Copilot CLI requires Node.js). Ensure the setup-node/nvm install path is bind-mounted into /host and on PATH inside the chroot, or bundle node into the chroot image. Add a pre-flight `node --version` check in the chroot entrypoint so this fails fast with a clear message. Likely a regression from the active chroot/binaries-source-path refactor — verify before that work merges.
